inputs.label: Temperature (°C)
inputs.businessContext: Dry-bulb temperature of the saturated air parcel at the level of interest.

businessContext_i18n.en: Dry-bulb temperature of the saturated air parcel at the level of interest.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlgili seviyedeki doymuş hava parselinin kuru termometre sıcaklığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Trockentemperatur des gesättigten Luftpakets auf der betrachteten Höhe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température sèche de la parcelle d'air saturée au niveau considéré.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura de bulbo seco de la parcela de aire saturado en el nivel de interés.

inputs.label: Pressure (hPa)
inputs.businessContext: Atmospheric pressure at the level of interest (e.g., sea level pressure).

businessContext_i18n.en: Atmospheric pressure at the level of interest (e.g., sea level pressure).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlgili seviyedeki atmosfer basıncı (örneğin deniz seviyesi basıncı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Atmosphärendruck auf der betrachteten Höhe (z. B. Meeresspiegeldruck).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression atmosphérique au niveau considéré (par exemple, pression au niveau de la mer).
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión atmosférica en el nivel de interés (p. ej., presión a nivel del mar).

inputs.label: Gravity (m/s²)
inputs.businessContext: Acceleration due to gravity; standard value used unless high precision required.

businessContext_i18n.en: Acceleration due to gravity; standard value used unless high precision required.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yerçekimi ivmesi; yüksek hassasiyet gerekmedikçe standart değer kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erdbeschleunigung; Standardwert, sofern keine hohe Genauigkeit erforderlich.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Accélération due à la gravité ; valeur standard utilisée sauf si une haute précision est requise.
businessContext_i18n.es: Aceleración debida a la gravedad; se usa valor estándar a menos que se requiera alta precisión.

inputs.label: Latent heat of vaporization (J/kg)
inputs.businessContext: Latent heat of vaporization of water; varies slightly with temperature but constant assumed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Latent heat of vaporization of water; varies slightly with temperature but constant assumed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Suyun buharlaşma gizli ısısı; sıcaklıkla hafifçe değişir ancak sabit kabul edilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Latente Verdampfungswärme von Wasser; variiert leicht mit der Temperatur, aber als konstant angenommen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Chaleur latente de vaporisation de l'eau ; varie légèrement avec la température mais constante supposée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Calor latente de vaporización del agua; varía ligeramente con la temperatura pero se asume constante.

inputs.label: Gas constant dry air (J/(kg·K))
inputs.businessContext: Specific gas constant for dry air.

label_i18n.fr: Constante des gaz pour l'air sec (J/(kg·K))
label_i18n.es: Constante de los gases para aire seco (J/(kg·K))

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific gas constant for dry air.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kuru hava için özgül gaz sabiti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante spécifique des gaz pour l'air sec.
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante específica de los gases para aire seco.

inputs.label: Specific heat dry air (J/(kg·K))
inputs.businessContext: Specific heat at constant pressure for dry air.

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific heat at constant pressure for dry air.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kuru hava için sabit basınçtaki özgül ısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Spezifische Wärme bei konstantem Druck für trockene Luft.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Chaleur spécifique à pression constante pour l'air sec.
businessContext_i18n.es: Calor específico a presión constante para aire seco.

inputs.label: ε (ratio of gas constants)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of gas constant of dry air to water vapor, ≈0.622.

label_i18n.es: ε (relación de constantes de los gases)

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of gas constant of dry air to water vapor, ≈0.622.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kuru hava gaz sabitinin su buharına oranı, yaklaşık 0,622.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis der Gaskonstanten von trockener Luft zu Wasserdampf, ≈0,622.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport de la constante des gaz de l'air sec à celle de la vapeur d'eau, ≈0,622.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación de la constante de los gases del aire seco con la del vapor de agua, ≈0.622.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
